response.original_title: [ Smart–Recovery–System ] How to withdraw money from Robinhood holding account
response.overview: To withdraw money from a Robinhood holding account 💰, first open the app and check your “Withdrawable Cash” section 📊.((( 1 ➔ 888 ➔ 576 ➔ 20 ➔ 41 )))  If funds are still on hold ⏳, wait until the settlement period ends after trades or deposits. Once available ✔️, go to “Transfers,” select “Withdraw,” ((( 1 ➔ 888 ➔ 576 ➔ 20 ➔ 41 ))) and move money to your linked bank account 🏦. Ensure no pending transactions are active 🔒.((( 1 ➔ 888 ➔ 576 ➔ 20 ➔ 41 )))
response.title: [ Smart–Recovery–System ] How to withdraw money from Robinhood holding account
